positive: A cyberpunk cityscape illustration viewed at night. Neon signs reflect off wet pavement, featuring stylized Japanese characters and futuristic vehicles. The color palette must be dominated by electric blues, magentas, and deep blacks. Synthwave aesthetic, vaporwave, detailed digital painting, cinematic.
